query: SELECT COUNT(*) as leads_total FROM leads; SELECT COUNT(*) as users_total FROM users; SELECT COUNT(*) as leads_teste FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as corretores_teste FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as leads_total FROM leads; SELECT COUNT(*) as users_total FROM users; SELECT COUNT(*) as leads_teste FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE 'Lead %' OR nome LIKE 'Test%' OR nome LIKE 'Teste%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as corretores_teste FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste';
